prompt: Smooth line chart of weekly total signups for the Organic and Social channels only, one line each, across the whole year.
Total units by product for the West region, in March, June and September only, as a bar chart.
Stacked area chart of daily visits broken down by channel, excluding Email, over the summer months.
Share of total revenue by region for the Gizmo product only.
Scatter of temperature versus humidity, one series per sensor, for readings after 2024-03-08.
Grouped bar counting, for each channel, how many days its visits exceeded 1,000 during the first quarter.
Average signups by day of the week for the Paid channel, as a bar chart.
How many days did each channel get more than 50 signups in the last quarter?
On a line chart with two separate y-axes, compare monthly total visits against monthly total signups for the Paid channel across the year.
Compare total units and total revenue per product as side-by-side bars.
Monthly conversion rate — signups divided by visits — for each channel as separate lines, in the second half of the year.
Compare average visits on weekends versus weekdays across all seven days, for the Organic and Email channels.
note: ambiguous: 7 weekday buckets vs 2 weekend/weekday buckets

prompt: Total signups by channel during the last week of December.
Daily visits in the first 10 days of February for the Social channel as a line.
Temperature for both sensors as two lines, between 2024-03-04 and 2024-03-11, day by day.
The top 2 regions by total revenue, plotted month by month as two lines.
For the region that sells the most units overall, break that region's revenue down by product.
Horizontal bar ranking the four regions highest-to-lowest by total revenue, for the Gizmo product only.
Stacked bar of revenue by region for each month, for the Widget and Gadget products combined.
As a step line, show the Email channel's daily signups over the last 60 days of data.
Donut chart of total units by region for the Gadget product only.
Nightingale rose chart of total units by product, for the North and South regions combined.
For every channel, show its single best day of signups, as a horizontal bar chart.
Each region's worst single month of revenue, as a bar chart.
The average monthly visits per channel — for each channel, the mean of its monthly totals.
In the month the Paid channel's signups peak, show every channel's total visits side by side.
On the single day Organic had its highest visits, plot each channel's signups as bars.
For the product with the highest total revenue, chart that product's units by region.
Daily visits over time, one line per channel, for every channel except Email and Paid.
In the busiest single week of the year for total visits, show each channel's signups per day.
note: compound nested pick (busiest week) then daily-by-channel; ideal xLen=7 seriesCount=4

prompt: Only the months where the North region's revenue beat 4,000, charted as North's units those months.
note: per-group HAVING filter not expressible by row-level filters
